# UniFi

> A SemVer-versioned Go SDK (module `github.com/thathaneydude/unifi`, Go 1.26) for the official
> UniFi Network and UniFi Protect integration APIs. Clients are generated from OpenAPI with
> oapi-codegen; a thin hand-written core makes authenticating to a UniFi application — locally or
> remotely — trivial, and adds a version-agnostic WebSocket layer for Protect real-time streams.
> The repo also ships a co-equal `unifi` **CLI** whose primary user is an LLM agent.

Key facts an assistant should know before working in this repo:

- Generated code lives **only** under `lib/<app>/<appversion>` (e.g. `lib/network/v10_3_58`,
  `lib/protect/v7_1_46`). It is **purely generated — never hand-edit it**. Fix issues in
  `specs/overlays/` or generator config, then regenerate.
- The hand-written core is the root `unifi/` package: `Local`/`Remote` constructors, `X-API-KEY`
  transport, TLS options, errors, and the WebSocket layer. It is shared by both the SDK and CLI.
- The **CLI** lives in `cmd/unifi` (thin entrypoint) and `internal/cli` (engine). It is
  **spec-driven**: it embeds `specs/build/**` and builds `unifi <app> <operationId>` commands at
  runtime — never hand-write per-operation commands. Output is JSON by default; errors are a JSON
  envelope with stable exit codes (0 ok, 1 usage, 2 auth, 3 API non-2xx, 4 transport);
  `unifi schema` and `unifi <app> list-operations` are the agent's discovery entry points. Realtime
  WebSocket subscriptions are intentionally SDK-only.
- Specs are **not vendored raw**. `tools/specgen` (via `just sync`) pulls pinned specs from the
  `opastorello/unifi-api-docs` mirror into gitignored `specs/.cache/`, applies overlays, and writes
  committed `specs/build/<app>/<ver>/openapi.json`. `specs/versions.yaml` is the source of truth for
  pinned versions; multiple app versions coexist.
- Tasks run through **Justfiles** (`just sync`, `just gen`, `just test`, `just test-e2e`, `just lint`,
  `just docs`, `just release`). No Make/Task.
- Tests use **Ginkgo + Gomega**; fakes come from **counterfeiter** (`go generate ./...`).
- Commits follow **Conventional Commits**; `CHANGELOG.md` is generated by git-cliff; releases run
  through goreleaser on tags.
- Agent guidance lives in `.github/AGENTS.md` (not `CLAUDE.md`).

## Documentation

- [Functional requirements](./docs/requirements/functional-requirements.md): What the SDK must do — actors, FR/NFR, acceptance criteria.
- [Architecture](./docs/design/architecture.md): Package layout, transport, error handling, realtime, generation pipeline.
- [Authentication & transport](./docs/design/authentication.md): API keys, X-API-KEY, local vs remote base URLs, TLS options.
- [Spec augmentation](./docs/design/spec-augmentation.md): How SDK-ready OpenAPI specs are produced deterministically via overlays.
- [Decision records](./docs/design/decisions/index.md): Index of all accepted ADRs.

## Guides

- [Getting started](./docs/guides/getting-started.md): Install, create an API key, first request.
- [Local vs remote](./docs/guides/local-vs-remote.md): Choosing a transport and a non-default version.
- [Protect realtime](./docs/guides/protect-realtime.md): Subscribing to Protect device/event streams.

## Key decisions

- [ADR-0001 — oapi-codegen](./docs/design/decisions/0001-generate-from-openapi-with-oapi-codegen.md): Generator choice.
- [ADR-0002 — Local & remote transports](./docs/design/decisions/0002-local-and-remote-transports.md): Two constructors, one Conn.
- [ADR-0003 — Pull specs in CI](./docs/design/decisions/0003-pull-specs-in-ci-not-vendored.md): No vendored raw upstream.
- [ADR-0004 — Coexisting versioned lib packages](./docs/design/decisions/0004-coexisting-versioned-lib-packages.md): Version model.
- [ADR-0005 — Hand-written WebSocket client](./docs/design/decisions/0005-hand-written-websocket-client.md): Realtime approach.
- [ADR-0007 — Protect version pin](./docs/design/decisions/0007-protect-version-pin.md): v7.1.46 now, v7.1.83 via bot.

## Source of truth

- [Upstream spec mirror](https://github.com/opastorello/unifi-api-docs): Daily mirror of developer.ui.com OpenAPI JSON.
- [UniFi Network docs](https://developer.ui.com/network/v10.3.58/gettingstarted): Official Network API portal.
- [UniFi Protect docs](https://developer.ui.com/protect/v7.1.83/gettingstarted): Official Protect API portal.

## Optional

- [Design & implementation plan](./docs/design/architecture.md): See architecture plus the repository's tracked plan.
- [Changelog](./docs/changelog.md): Release history (generated by git-cliff).
